blocks.text: Thanks for the quick turn on the segment file over the weekend. Daniel Leach has loaded it, and the customer-level detail is there for the largest segment, though the second one still comes through at the segment total only. We can start on the first and come back to the second, so this does not hold us up. I have flagged in our notes which segment is running on totals, so nothing downstream mistakes it for account-level detail.

The one open item is scheduling. The segment leads at Key Group have given us three of the four interview slots. The outstanding one is the head of the industrial line, who I understand is traveling until the following week. If someone on your side can help us land thirty minutes with him, that closes the set. The current-position read for {{fact:f:E-2009-002.client}} is firmer once we have heard from all four, so I would like to close that interview before we go much further.
That is the only thing I need from you right now. I will keep this thread updated as the interviews land and the sizing fills in.
